reference: You have hypothyroidism secondary to radiation therapy to the neck. It requires replacement of thyroid hormones. Both Eltroxin and Thyronorm contain levothyroxine. Eltroxin is more expensive than Thyronorm. If you do not have affordability issues, I would suggest Eltroxin, as I have found it to be very effective in my patients and it is well known to be a quality brand.
